Module 5: Kernel Subsystems & Observability
Objective:   Implement memory management, a simple filesystem, I/O drivers, and end-to-end tracing.

• Systems Performance (Brendan Gregg)
Further Studies • Linux From Scratch (paging & fs chapters)
• Academic papers on eBPF & tracing
